docs.title: Android 🤖
docs.text: Android can be used to host applications with Termux From there I can do a variety of things with Nodejs or Python

docs.title: List 📓
docs.text:
• TV Box Noga ULTRA10+
  • 2 Android phones with at least 8gb storage

docs.title: 05/12/2023 ⏰
docs.text:
Now I have been confirm that I can expose static web services from android devices

In the android device we run:

termux http-server

And in another server we have:

cloudflare-tunnel

The way it works is I expose the webpage with http-server at port 8080 with npx http-server <path-to-folder> &, then I'll go to cloudflare public hostnames and add a new one

with HTTP://<device-ip>:<port>

docs.title: Connect to WiFi -> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3zqITuprlL8
docs.text: iwctl device list station scan station get-networks station connect station show

docs.title: Security Section
docs.text: If you find anything wrong with the security of my server please let me know. Contact me at email

docs.title: Nmap 🌐

docs.title: Firewall 🛡️
docs.text:
Custom Rules

# Block non-HTTP/S traffic
not cf.edge.server_port in {80 443}

# Block PHP, XML, and WordPress
(lower(http.request.uri.path) contains "wp-")
or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains ".php")
or (lower(http.request.uri.path) contains ".xml")
